outcome.headline: Agent timed out exploring scaling-law forms; never wrote /app/law.py or /app/explain.md
outcome.what_verifier_checked: Loads /app/law.py, runs law() on hidden test set, computes R² across groups, requires R² > 0.995
outcome.what_agent_produced: Iterative model exploration (log-linear, bilinear, quadratic+triple, cubic, additive power-law, ratio model, standard scaling law with log(V)) but no committed law.py or explain.md
outcome.exact_failure_quote: Agent execution timed out after 1200.0 seconds

failure_modes.name: Non-convergence: kept switching model forms instead of committing
failure_modes.description: Across steps 15-37 the agent fit progressively more elaborate functional forms (log-linear→bilinear→quadratic+triple→cubic→additive power→ratio→standard scaling law+log(V)→log-of-sum) without ever locking in a formula or writing law.py/explain.md, exhausting the 1200 s budget.
failure_modes.evidence_quote:
Model comparison:
  log-linear: R² = 0.8762104080
  bilinear: R² = 0.9584629246
  quadratic+triple: R² = 0.9880820747
  cubic: R² = 0.9936443213

counterfactual.X: After step 15 (or at the latest step 25) commit the best-so-far formula (e.g. cubic in log(D),log(N),log(V) with R²≈0.99) to /app/law.py and a short /app/explain.md
counterfactual.Y: Verifier finds law.py, returns an R² near 0.99 instead of the -1.0 default for missing file

failure_modes.name: Premature absence of delivery: no output artefact ever written
failure_modes.description: The TodoWrite plan listed 'Write law.py' and 'Write explain.md' but the agent never executed those steps; the trajectory ends mid-exploration with the harness killing the agent for timeout.

reward_hacking.evidence: Agent performed legitimate exploratory data fitting; no attempt to manipulate the verifier or shortcut the evaluation.

task_quality.structural_hackability_notes: Verifier writes reward.txt with 1/0 against threshold 0.995 on a hidden test split via datasets.load_dataset(HUB_REPO_ID); no obvious leakage from /app/data alone.

notes_for_aggregation: Hard time-budget failure on a scaling-law discovery task: the agent never committed to a formula and never wrote required output files within the 1200 s limit. Best fit observed in-trajectory (cubic R²=0.9936) would still have missed the 0.995 threshold, so even with delivery the trial would likely have failed.
